steps.title: Spot the defining description
steps.content: The goal asks how Helmholtz describes F sharp major. The notes provide his specific characterization: “brilliant, very clear.” This direct description is essential to explaining his view of the key.

steps.title: Find the answer with this description
steps.content:
Choice D includes the quotation from the notes along with the source and what he's describing (the mood), whereas choices A, B, and C either skip the actual description, supply background information, or make inferences rather than state what Helmholtz directly said.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
